title: Send guests to login instead of a not-found page for an unavailable sub-app
description: When a signed-out visitor opens a sub-app that exists but isn't available to them, they are now taken to the login page — and returned to the page they wanted after signing in — instead of a page-not-found. A signed-in visitor who isn't allowed the sub-app now sees an access-denied page. A sub-app that genuinely doesn't exist or isn't enabled still shows page-not-found. This is consistent across every sub-app.
